name: Indoor National
address: 8127 Mesa Dr Suite B-200, Austin, TX 78759
about: Indoor National is an unstaffed, private access, simulator golf studio open 24/7 to members and their guests. The venue features two private simulator bays equipped with Trackman iO launch monitor systems and Fiberbuilt Player Preferred hitting mats. Members have access to a practice putting green and can bring their own food and drink. The facility aims to provide an affordable and convenient place for dedicated golfers to work on their game without the noise and distraction of larger golf entertainment venues. The club is designed to cater to golfers of all skill levels, offering a warm and inviting atmosphere for both serious grinders and casual players.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access for members and their guests
Premium Trackman iO technology for accurate data
Private access simulator bays for a focused experience
Self-service simplicity with no staff required

food_and_drink.notes: Members are allowed to bring their own food
Members are allowed to bring their own drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor system for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but members are expected to bring their own equipment as it's a private access facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, members are allowed to bring their own food and drink to the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing details, but with Trackman technology and private bays, play time would depend on player pace and simulator software used.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly mention kid-friendly features or policies, though it does state golfers of all skill levels are welcome.
